text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp to prepare for the fall races begins.
We learn that many distinguished racers will be
running in the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mejiro Palmer is undaunted by the
intimidating might of the star runners and starts
the summer with a bang.
